hero_subtitle: SFTY supports regulated digital asset businesses with secure private cloud deployment that preserves audit trails, governance, role-based access, and scalable compliance workflows.

problem_title: Compliance controls weaken without private cloud
problem_description: Institutional firms face challenges scaling compliance operations when audit logs, access controls and evidence governance rely on fragmented or public infrastructure. This gap slows onboarding, complicates bank due diligence and obscures clear operational oversight for regulated digital asset workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates audit logs, role-based access, evidence integrity and workflow controls into a private cloud layer so VASPs can scale compliance operations with institutional trust and clear oversight.
workflow_title: From deployment controls to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY connects private cloud deployment settings, access controls and audit logs into traceable compliance evidence for scalable institutional workflows and review readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: More than deployment. Secure compliance control
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides a private cloud layer that preserves audit evidence, enforces role-based access and supports scalable, traceable compliance workflows without replacing existing tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for institutional compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides institutional teams a compliance control layer that connects provider outputs into structured workflows, audit evidence, regulatory rule monitoring, case management and reporting for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support private cloud deployment?
faq_2_answer: SFTY supports private cloud deployment with role-based access control, audit logs, evidence integrity, encryption, configurable data retention and governance controls suitable for scalable, secure compliance operations.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting evidence within a consistent audit trail to support review readiness, operational traceability and defensible reporting processes.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one compliance operating layer without replacing them, connecting their outputs into actionable workflows and reports.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT, or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace underlying providers; instead, it turns their outputs into structured cases, decisions, regulatory rule updates and audit evidence while supporting provider neutrality.
final_title: Review scalable compliance deployment with SFTY
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports private cloud scalability, role-based access, audit logs and controlled workflows for regulated VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
